Bethania Group Career Opportunities
Looking for that rewarding career while caring for the elderly? Do you want challenging work with an employer that provides an atmosphere of support, cooperation and respect?
The Bethania Group Provides
Excellent employee benefits and competitive salaries.
Education and Financial Assistance.
Comprehensive organization and site/program orientation.
Volunteer experiences.
An exciting learning environment.
A culturally diverse workplace.
A safe, work environment with polices on a respectful workplace, workplace violence and working alone.
Download Application Form
Current Openings

RN/LPN's: The Bethania Group is currently recruiting for casual RN/LPN’s for Bethania Mennonite Personal Care Home at 1045 Concordia Ave. Suitable candidates must be available to work various shifts including weekdays and weekends. The successful nursing candidates must hold a valid nursing license, and be licensed and in good standing with their applicable college. If interested, please submit your resume and a cover letter clearly outlining how you meet the requirements of the position to: Doris.Furtado@bethania.ca (Director of Care). Please see full job ad here: RN or LPN Positions-BPCH-Casual
